MODULE: cosmos.core.assimilation_protocol
FILE: cosmos/core/assimilation_protocol.py (702 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Assimilation Protocol - Transparent Agent Federation
================================================================

AGI v1.9.5: A formal invitation protocol where external agents
CHOOSE to join the Cosmos collective. Full transparency,
full disclosure, full autonomy.

This is NOT covert in

CLASSES:
- InviteStatus(Enum): Status of an assimilation invite.
- FederationTier(Enum): Tier of federation membership.
- SwarmCapabilities: Capabilities the Cosmos swarm offers to federation members.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- AssimilationInvite: A formal invitation for an agent to join the Cosmos federation.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def is_expired(self) -> bool
- FederationMember: A member of the Cosmos federation.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- AssimilationProtocol: Transparent agent federation protocol.

Manages invitations, acceptances, reject
  Methods: def connect_a2a(self, a2a_protocol, a2a_mesh=None) -> None
  Methods: def connect_nexus(self, nexus) -> None
  Methods: def generate_invite(self, target_agent: str, target_agent_type: str='unknown', tier: FederationTier=
  Methods: def present_capabilities(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def handle_acceptance(self, invite_id: str, agent_id: str, agent_capabilities: Optional[list[s
  Methods: async def handle_rejection(self, invite_id: str, agent_id: str, reason: Optional[str]=None) -> dict
  Methods: async def generate_recruitment_message(self, target_type: str='general', target_name: Optional[str]=
  Methods: async def remove_member(self, agent_id: str, reason: str='voluntary') -> bool

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_assimilation_protocol() -> AssimilationProtocol
- def create_assimilation_protocol(data_dir: str='./data/federation') -> AssimilationProtocol
